title: Deprecate node_server.py in favor of RenodeServer
description: NodeServer (node_server.py) uses poll-based RX with 1ms sleep loop. RenodeServer (renode_server.py) has push-based RX. Migrate all usages of NodeServer to RenodeServer, update SimulatorServer.get_node_server_port to spawn RenodeServer instances, then delete node_server.py.
notes:
Architecture analysis: NodeServer handles MSG_REGISTER/MSG_RX/MSG_TIME/MSG_CAD for SimRadio clients. RenodeServer uses a simpler per-node protocol (MSG_TX/MSG_RX_ENTER/MSG_RX_EXIT only, fixed node_id). Migration requires either: (1) extending RenodeServer to handle all messages, or (2) changing SimRadio to use per-node connections. This is a design decision, not a drop-in replacement.
Progress: Fixed push-based RX_ENTER handler in NodeServer to use background simulation driver instead of polling.

Changes:
1. Added _sim_driver_task field and _simulation_driver() background task to NodeServer
2. Added _ensure_simulation_driver() to start driver on first node registration
3. Refactored _handle_rx_enter() to await event instead of polling loop
4. Added deprecation notes to poll-based _handle_rx() and _await_rx_result()
5. Updated module docstring to reflect current state

The push-based RX path (used by SimRadio) now uses proper event-driven I/O. The legacy poll-based MSG_RX handler still polls but is deprecated - SimRadio already uses RX_ENTER.

All tests pass (test_node_server.py, test_integration.py, test_sim_client.py, test_server.py, test_multinode.py).

Remaining work:
- Deprecate MSG_RX entirely (remove from protocol, update tests to use RX_ENTER)
- Consider unifying NodeServer with RenodeServer architecture
- This now unblocks project-LICHEN-906e (RX_POLL removal) for the push-based path
Additional progress: Converted test_node_server.py tests to use push-based RX_ENTER.

Changes:
- Updated TestNodeServerRx tests to use encode_rx_enter, MSG_RX_PACKET, MSG_RX_TIMEOUT_PUSH
- Removed poll-based imports (encode_rx, decode_rx_ok, MSG_RX_OK, MSG_RX_TIMEOUT) from test_node_server.py
- All 758 sim tests pass

Remaining poll-based RX usage:
- node_server.py _handle_rx() method (deprecated, for backward compatibility)
- test_protocol.py (tests the protocol encoding API itself, not runtime usage)

This significantly unblocks project-LICHEN-906e. The only remaining runtime poll-based usage is the deprecated _handle_rx handler which could be removed if there are no external clients using MSG_RX.
close_reason: Converted test_node_server.py to push-based RX, 758 tests pass
